_comment: Synthetic test fixture, 7 markers representative of the calculation cases the adapter must cover. Vertex indices are arbitrary plausible values within [0, 18439) (the real MHR vertex count); they are NOT pulled from a real picking session. RLMAL is locked at vertex 17393 because the adapter test asserts it byte-exactly.

frame_alignment.rotation_xxx: identity (3x3 ones+zeros built at load time, see conftest.py)

markers.name: RLMAL
markers._note: bony, single vertex; adapter test pins position to vertex 17393 byte-exact

markers.name: LLMAL
markers._note: mirror of RLMAL; bony, single vertex

markers.name: RFLT
markers._note: soft tissue (right femur lateral thigh cluster); source must be soft

markers.name: RWrist_hand
markers._note: bony, centroid of 3 vertices; adapter test asserts position == mean of these 3
